nasb.text: I commanded Joshua at that time, saying, ‘Your eyes have seen all that the Lord your God has done to these two kings; so the Lord shall do to all the kingdoms into which you are about to cross.

esv.text: And I commanded Joshua at that time, ‘Your eyes have seen all that the Lord your God has done to these two kings. So will the Lord do to all the kingdoms into which you are crossing.

cnv.text: 那時，我吩咐約書亞：‘你親眼看見了耶和華你們的　神向這兩個王所行的一切；耶和華也必向你正要去的各國照樣行。

ccb.text: 那时我吩咐约书亚，‘你们的上帝耶和华怎样对付那两个王，你都亲眼看见了。耶和华必以同样的方式对付你将去攻占的各国。
